title: Unitree Introducing | Unitree As2  Your Companion
summary: Compact size, industrial capability. Maximum torque of 90N·m, over 4 hours of no-load runtime, IP54 rainproof design. With a 15 kg payload, range exceeds 13 km. Open secondary development, empowering industry applications.

title: Unitree Kung Fu Bot   Pray for Blessings at the Temple of Heaven: Wish Everyone All the Best
